title: bromus divaricatus var. macrostachys
intro: Bromus divaricatus var. macrostachys, also known as the woodland brome or big-spike brome, is a type of grass native to North America. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bromus divaricatus var. macrostachys include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antidote for poisoning. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
